overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a nighttime walk along a rain-soaked city sidewalk in Los Santos. Palm trees line a multi-lane road while modern glass office towers rise in the background, with the player passing a wooden utility shed and observing passing vehicles on the wet asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: rain-slicked downtown sidewalk with palm tree median

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk next to a multi-lane road

entered.detail: row of tall palm tree trunks separating sidewalk from the road
continuous dense green hedge running along the right side of the path
multi-lane road with wet reflective surface showing vehicle light reflections
modern high-rise building with illuminated windows visible through the palm trees
tall street lamps casting light along the road median

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily along a rain-soaked concrete sidewalk at night. Palm tree trunks line the left side between the walkway and a multi-lane road, while a continuous hedge wall runs along the right. In the distance, a tall modern office building with illuminated windows rises against the dark sky, and street lights cast reflections on the wet pavement.

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past the wooden utility structure on the right

entered.detail: small weathered wooden shed with sloped roof situated between sidewalk and hedge

segments.scene_description: The walk continues past a wooden utility shed that appears on the right side, temporarily interrupting the hedge wall. The shed is a small, weathered structure with a sloped roof. Palm trees continue to line the left side as vehicles pass by on the wet road, their headlights creating streaks of light on the asphalt.

events.description: white SUV drives past on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: walking as a white SUV passes by closely on the left side

notable_agents.action: white SUV driving past on the wet road, moving away from camera position

segments.scene_description: The wooden shed falls behind as the continuous hedge wall resumes on the right side. A white SUV drives past on the left side of the road, its headlights and taillights reflecting off the rain-slicked asphalt. The camera continues walking forward along the consistent urban pathway with the palm tree line still visible to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a rain-soaked urban sidewalk at night, moving past city greenery and utility structures toward a distant skyline. It begins by gliding along a concrete path flanked by a hedge wall on the right and a line of palm trees on the left, with street lights reflecting off the wet pavement beneath a towering, illuminated office building. As the camera advances, the hedge is briefly interrupted by a small, weathered wooden utility shed with a sloped roof while vehicles pass by on the adjacent road. The scene then shifts as the shed falls behind and the continuous hedge wall resumes, coinciding with a white SUV driving past and casting bright reflections across the slick asphalt. Finally, the camera continues its steady forward motion along the consistent urban pathway, maintaining the rhythmic line of palm trees against the dark city backdrop.
